meta.expr:content: data:blog.pageName + " - Vazhcha Yugam: Your Window to the World. Delivering unbiased news, deep-dive analysis, and global perspectives from the heart of Kerala."
meta.name: description

meta.content: Vazhcha Yugam, Global News Portal, Kerala Breaking News, International Affairs, Unbiased Journalism, Latest Malayalam News, World News Today
meta.name: keywords

meta.content: Vazhcha Yugam - Your Window to the World. Bringing you closer to the stories that matter with accuracy and integrity.
Vazhcha Yugam - Global News & Perspectives. Your Windows to the World.
meta.name: twitter:description

title.b:if:
| Vazhcha Yugam
| Your Window to the World
Vazhcha Yugam - Your Window to the World

div.div: Vazhcha Yugam & News On The Go

b:with.value: "window.prompt(\"Copy to clipboard: Ctrl+C, Enter\", \"" + data:originalUrl + "\"); return false;"

b:include.data: { sharingId: data:sharingId, originalUrl: data:post.url, platforms: data:this.sharing.platforms, shareUrl: data:post.shareUrl, shareTitle: data:post.title, }
b:include.name: sharingButtons

div.p: © Vazhcha Yugam| News On The Go | Contact For Ads
